000000010101100111110 - ASI: 13

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  110 = 11 * 0
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0101 = 01 * 01
  0110 = 0 * 110
  11110 = 11 * 110
  000101 = 00 * 0101
  011001 = 0110 * 01
  0000000101 = 0000 * 000101
  01100111110 = 011001 * 11110
  000000010101100111110 = 0000000101 * 01100111110
